products.descriptor: Air-cooled electric propulsion unit up to 40 kW for aircraft, eVTOLs, and drones

evidence.snippet: Whether for urban air mobility, drones, or hybrid flight concepts – we deliver scalable, air-cooled solutions with up to 50 kW of power.

*   Powerful 800 V system
*   40 kW  (air-cooled)

evidence.snippet:

products.name: Flight Control Computer (FCC)
products.descriptor: Universal avionics computer for safe flight control of manned and unmanned aircraft, drones, and helicopters

evidence.snippet: The Silver Atena Universal FCC (Flight Control Computer) is a powerful avionics computer for the highly automated control of manned and unmanned small aircraft, drones, and helicopters.
*   UAVs / drones, OPVs, and RPAS

products.name: FADEC
products.descriptor: Dual-channel full authority digital engine control unit for aircraft turbine and piston engines

evidence.snippet:
The dual-use capable Full Authority Digital Engine Control (FADEC) is a state-of-the-art, computer-controlled system to control all aspects of aircraft engine performance.
It provides full control over engine parameters of gas turbines (turboprop, turbofan, turboshaft) or piston engines, optimizing performance in real-time, enhancing flight safety, reducing pilot workload, and offers precise engine management.

products.name: FAN Inverter
products.descriptor: Air-cooled SiC-based drive inverter for electric aviation propulsion and eVTOL motors

evidence.snippet:
Drive inverters for aviation
============================
Air-cooled controllers for electric motors

Whether as an integrated part of a complete system or as a standalone component, the air-cooled power inverter controls your electric motor with high dynamics, precision, and reliability – even in demanding continuous operation.

products.name: H2 Tank Control
products.descriptor: Safety control unit for cryogenic hydrogen tanks in aerospace fuel cell systems

evidence.snippet:
H2 Tank Control
===============
Safety control unit for cryogenic hydrogen tanks

The H2 Aero Tank Controller manages all essential functions of a cryogenic hydrogen tank system under all flight conditions. It controls the refueling valves, monitors the fill level, temperature, and stable tank pressure, and ensures a reliable supply to the fuel cell.

products.name: Built-in devices 7" and 12"
products.descriptor: Ruggedized 7-inch and 12-inch vehicle-mounted displays for military and defence applications

evidence.snippet:
Built-in devices 7" and 12"
===========================
for demanding environments

products.name: Mobile Control Device
products.descriptor: Ruggedized 10.1-inch military touchscreen control and display unit for vehicles and command facilities

evidence.snippet: The Mobile Control Device from Silver Atena is a robust, modular control and display unit for military vehicles and command facilities.
Certified to MIL standards, it offers high reliability, glove-operable operation, and flexible integration into land, air, or sea-based platforms.

products.name: Central Control Unit
products.descriptor: MIL-certified ruggedized steering-handle control unit with 4.3-inch display for armored vehicles

evidence.snippet:
Central Control Unit
====================
Ruggedized control device for armored vehicles

The combination of steering handle and central control unit (CCU) is a robust, MIL-certified control solution for armored vehicles. It serves as the central human-machine interface for vehicle control under extreme operating conditions – from arctic cold to desert operations.

products.name: Battery Management Unit
products.descriptor: Scalable BMS for 12–800 V lithium batteries with ASIL-D safety classification

evidence.snippet:
The battery management system (BMS) monitors and controls battery performance, ensuring that the battery operates within safe limits.
It monitors numerous parameters of each cell, preventing damage to the battery pack.
The BMS ensures a balanced charge, significantly extending battery life.
Its scalability and reliability make it an essential component of any energy storage architecture.

*   **Voltage**: 12 V, 48 V, 400 V, 800 V
*   **Safety classification**: up to ASIL-D

products.name: DC Boost Charger
products.descriptor: High-power DC/DC boost charger enabling 400 V–800 V cross-compatibility for electric vehicles, up to 260 kW

evidence.snippet: The DC Boost Charger enables 800 V electric vehicles to charge at 400 V charging stations and delivers continuous power of 75 kW and above.

*   **Input voltage**: 200 V to 800 V
*   **Output voltage**: compatible with 400 V and 800 V systems
*   **Output power**:
    *   **Boost mode**: up to 75 kW continuous power
    *   **Bypass mode**: up to 260 kW

products.name: High-Voltage Traction Inverter

evidence.snippet:

products.name: Electric Turbocharger
products.descriptor: High-speed SiC inverter for turbocompressors in fuel cell and combustion vehicles, up to 70 kW at 160,000 rpm

evidence.snippet:
Electric turbocharger
=====================
Compact inverter for high-speed turbo compressors

*   **Technology**: Silicon carbide SiC (B6 bridge)
*   **Control**: PWM up to 70 kHz for speeds up to 160,000 rpm
*   **Speed ​​request**: 0 to nmax in <1 s
*   **Voltage**: 48 V to 800 V
*   **Power**: up to 70 kW
